mapper.select: SELECT USER_ID, USER_NAME, CUR_HP, MAX_HP, CUR_STAMINA, MAX_STAMINA, EXPERIENCE, GOLD, LAST_CALC_AT, DOWN_UNTIL, LAST_REROLL_AT, DAILY_REROLL_CNT FROM O_USERS WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
SELECT USER_ID, USER_NAME, CUR_HP, MAX_HP, CUR_STAMINA, MAX_STAMINA, EXPERIENCE, GOLD, LAST_CALC_AT, DOWN_UNTIL, LAST_REROLL_AT, DAILY_REROLL_CNT FROM O_USERS WHERE USER_NAME = #{name}

SELECT USER_ID, USER_NAME, CUR_HP, MAX_HP, CUR_STAMINA, MAX_STAMINA, EXPERIENCE, GOLD, LAST_CALC_AT, DOWN_UNTIL, LAST_REROLL_AT, DAILY_REROLL_CNT FROM O_USERS WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} FOR UPDATE NOWAIT
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO O_USERS (USER_ID, USER_NAME, LAST_CALC_AT, BATTLE_STATE, DAILY_REROLL_CNT) SELECT #{userId}, #{userName}, SYSTIMESTAMP, 'NONE', 0 FROM DUAL WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM O_USERS WHERE USER_ID = #{userId})
mapper.update: UPDATE O_USERS SET USER_NAME = #{userName} WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}

UPDATE O_USERS SET CUR_HP = #{hp}, MAX_HP = #{maxHp}, CUR_STAMINA = #{stamina}, MAX_STAMINA = #{maxStamina}, EXPERIENCE = #{experience}, GOLD = #{gold}, LAST_CALC_AT = #{lastCalcAt, typeHandler=com.iyo.ohhaeng.infra.db.typehandler.InstantTypeHandler}, DOWN_UNTIL = #{downUntil, typeHandler=com.iyo.ohhaeng.infra.db.typehandler.InstantTypeHandler, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, LAST_REROLL_AT = #{lastRerollAt, typeHandler=com.iyo.ohhaeng.infra.db.typehandler.InstantTypeHandler, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, DAILY_REROLL_CNT = #{dailyRerollCount} WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
